title: WindRose
description: A new HUD to display important stats
body:
## 🌹 WindRose

WindRose adds a clean, fully customizable HUD with useful statistics all in Vanilla. This is a lightweight Client-side mod that improves your Minecraft Experience.


---

### Key Features

- Adds a new HUD with day counter, coordinates, direction, totem count and fps:

![Highly configurable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b386dda40ce9a05f6ff263b285a5dfe38ee7ffb6.png)

- Highly configurable:

![Change order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70355fe2ddc9add8da91e20a4b7c1b8b61e2b0ad_0.webp)

- Separate color settings and custom labels:

![Custom labels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b20dbdf775b1a13d4e34ac852102e9d44300943_0.webp)

- And a lot of other configs


---

### Notes
You are free to add this mod to any modpack you'd like.
